records.question: Where is the cinema located in County Wicklow with a capacity of 1100 that shows films directed by Bill Schreiner featuring at least 2 in the season and tickets priced at most 12.99?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT cinema.cinema_id FROM cinema
JOIN schedule ON cinema.cinema_id = schedule.cinema_id
JOIN film ON schedule.film_id = film.film_id
WHERE film.number_in_season >= 2 AND schedule.price <= 12.99 AND cinema.location = 'County Wicklow' AND film.directed_by = 'Bill Schreiner' AND cinema.capacity = 1100
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.Cinema_ID
FROM cinema c
JOIN schedule s ON c.Cinema_ID = s.Cinema_ID
JOIN film f ON s.Film_ID = f.Film_ID
WHERE c.Location = 'County Wicklow'
AND c.Capacity = 1100
AND f.Directed_by = 'Bill Schreiner'
AND f.Number_in_season >= 2
AND s.Price <= 12.99

records.question: Which cinemas with a capacity of exactly 1100 have showings where the date is 21 May?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT cinema.cinema_id FROM cinema

WHERE schedule.date = '21 May' AND cinema.capacity = 1100
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.Cinema_ID
FROM cinema c
JOIN schedule s ON c.Cinema_ID = s.Cinema_ID
WHERE c.Capacity = 1100
AND s.Date = '21 May'

records.question: Where is the cinema named Oriel located in County Louth?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT cinema.cinema_id FROM cinema
WHERE cinema.name = 'Oriel' AND cinema.location = 'County Louth'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Cinema_ID FROM cinema WHERE Name = 'Oriel' AND Location = 'County Louth'

records.question: What cinemas named Codling opened in 2010 in County Wicklow with a capacity of at most 1100?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT cinema.cinema_id FROM cinema
WHERE cinema.openning_year = 2010 AND cinema.name = 'Codling' AND cinema.location = 'County Wicklow' AND cinema.capacity <= 1100
records.pred_sql: SELECT Cinema_ID FROM cinema WHERE Name = 'Codling' AND Openning_year = 2010 AND Location = 'County Wicklow' AND Capacity <= 1100

records.question: Which cinemas are showing The Case: Off the Record films with a rank in the series of at least 28?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT cinema.cinema_id FROM cinema
JOIN schedule ON cinema.cinema_id = schedule.cinema_id
JOIN film ON schedule.film_id = film.film_id
WHERE film.title = 'The Case: Off the Record' AND film.rank_in_series >= 28
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.Cinema_ID
FROM cinema c
JOIN schedule s ON c.Cinema_ID = s.Cinema_ID
JOIN film f ON s.Film_ID = f.Film_ID
WHERE f.Title = 'The Case: Off the Record'
AND f.Rank_in_series >= 28

records.question: Which cinemas named Oriel that opened exactly in 2013 have a capacity of at most 330 and offer no more than 5 show times on 19 May with ticket prices at least 15.99?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT cinema.cinema_id FROM cinema
JOIN schedule ON cinema.cinema_id = schedule.cinema_id
WHERE cinema.capacity <= 330 AND schedule.price >= 15.99 AND schedule.date = '19 May' AND cinema.openning_year = 2013 AND schedule.show_times_per_day <= 5 AND cinema.name = 'Oriel'
